signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Middle East tensions drive safe-haven demand — JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). USD/JPY at 159.78; safe-haven bid competes with 450bp Fed-BoJ carry differential. Risk-off flow historically unwinds JPY shorts — key level 160.00 tested.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs ATM IV 9.4% — market hedging rather than chasing. Price bid at 0.7125; positioning stalling — late-trend caution signal.

signals.title: EUR/USD — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: EUR leads G8 laggard (−0.515% avg, 7 pairs) while USD leads (+0.440% avg, 7 pairs) — G8 spread: 0.956%. EUR/USD at 1.1685; ECB 2% vs Fed 3.75% — 175bp carry advantage drives divergence.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp carry; BoE hike expected soon. GBP/USD at 1.3464; 1.3500 resistance on a carry-neutral view.
